subcodes.first_line: O Shahriar, King of the celestial realm, may the Lord be thy Helper. Place thy trust in God and turn away from worldly fortune [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شهریار شاه کشور آسمان یارت باد بپروردگار امیدوار باش و از روزگار بیزار
subcodes.subjects: @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
